title: いつか花咲くその日まで

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am the Empress, Air Groove. I aim to embody the ideals of all
Umamusume and serve as a guiding beacon for all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Empress" is more than just a title to Air Groove. It's an aspiration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't claim to fully understand what that aspiration entails, but I can
tell I've taken a step closer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! Thank you for sharing that. I'll give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're right! Thank you, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recall the satisfied looks on her fellow students' faces, but more
importantly, the gentle warmth that radiated from her own...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that supporting her fellow students is very important to Air
Groove, both through her student council activities and her personal
mentoring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? My training regimen? You'll look over it in place of Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow—thank you very much! Oh, so about this part on hamstring
exercises...

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Man, these documents are really giving me a headache. Maybe I
should ask the vice prez about them...
choice_data_list: I can help you if you'd like.
I can help you if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? You'd be a lifesaver! I wasn't sure how to tally up the
votes here...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey. Just what do you think you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't play dumb. Do you think I wouldn't notice that you've been
snatching up my student council tasks and student appointments?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What are you trying to say? That I should just stay in my lane and
focus on racing?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well? Answer me! And if I don't like what I hear, our contract is over!
choice_data_list: I want to value the same things that you do.
I want to value the same things that you do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: And I want to help you out, as your trainer.
And I want to help you out, as your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: To... help me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that I want her to let me help with her various activities, so
that she can devote more time to training without giving up on any of
them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Me, rely on you? You could stand to be a little more
dependable before suggesting such a thing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Our contract will remain effective. That is all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A sturdy scepter to support my weight as I walk my royal path...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So that is a trainer's role...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to take on some of Air Groove's tasks where I can, and in
return she applies herself to her training with greater vigor than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And at last, the day of the maiden race that we have been preparing
for arrives.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
After a beautiful start, she's pushed all the way forward to the front of
the pack—it's today's favorite, Air Groove! Can she shake off her
debut race loss?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ha!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's not slowing down! She's fast! Air Groove widens her lead! She's
in a league of her own!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a finish! Our winner comes in at an overwhelming five lengths
ahead of her competition!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The curtains are rising on the legendary reign of the Empress, Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after her stunning victory, I receive a text from Air Groove
letting me know that she needs my help with something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I grab my things in a rush and head over.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There you are. Wait... Why on earth are you so out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. The seeds I ordered have finally arrived, so let's get
started.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Flower seeds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The seeds, it turns out, are destined for the flower beds behind the
main school building. We begin the task of planting them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how many times do I have to tell you?! You're covering those
seeds with way too much soil!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Take your time and do each step properly. These seeds are way too
fragile for you to be rushing through this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a few mishaps and a fair bit of scolding, we just about manage
to wrap up the planting before sundown.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, that should do. I'm looking forward to seeing them bloom.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What, are you trying to say that's unexpected of me or something? It's
written all over your face.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When given the care and attention that they need, the buds emerge
strong and go on to bloom beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The cycle repeats as new buds grow—a testament to perseverance
and aspiration.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It was the sight of my own mother running on the turf that allowed me
to bloom into who I am.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The winner of the G1 Japanese Oaks inherits the title of "Queen of
the Oaks."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My mother was able to rise above the rest and ascend the throne as a
queen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When I learned about that legendary race and just how hard she
fought for the title... I was shaken to my very core. The seeds of
aspiration were sown.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I dreamt of following in her footsteps—of surpassing my limits, setting
foot into the world of racing, and claiming victory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And more than anything, I knew I wanted to continue the cycle and
inspire others, just as she inspired me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why I chose to embrace the title of "Empress." I wish to become
one who is looked upon by all Umamusume as an ideal to strive for.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To be as one like my very own mother—to bloom mightily and
elegantly as a sign of hope for the future.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And for that, simply winning races won't suffice. I need to prepare the
soil of this academy well, so that the seeds that follow after me may
grow strong.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If my trainers see no value in those seeds, then I have no need for a
trainer—or so I thought...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you... well. I suppose you may have earned a little—just a tiny bit,
mind you—of my t-trust...
choice_data_list: I have a green thumb, after all!
I have a green thumb, after all!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, shut it! You've got to be the worst gardener I've ever met!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Geez, I was entirely too quick to bring up this metaphor.
choice_data_list: Okay. I won't be "green" at this for long!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Knock it off with the tomfoolery!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her harsh words, I get the feeling her attitude toward me has
changed, if only slightly.
